name: 2. Deep Learning With TensorFlow Keras (O'Reilly) - MNIST CNN Notes
description: A convolutional neural network built with TensorFlow/Keras while following along with the O'Reilly Deep Learning book.
architecture: 28×28×1 → Conv(64,3×3) → MaxPool → Conv(64,3×3) → MaxPool → Flatten → Dense(128, tanh) → Dropout → Dense(128, tanh) → Dropout → Dense(10, softmax)

results.summary: ~99.1% test accuracy on 10,000 unseen images. Training was halted automatically by EarlyStopping (patience=5, monitoring val_loss) after ~12 epochs. Train/test gap of ~0.5%, showing the dropout + validation-split + early-stopping setup is keeping overfitting in check.
